mapper.select: SELECT id, name, ip, stream_url, status, last_online FROM devices ORDER BY id
SELECT id, name, ip, stream_url, status, last_online FROM devices WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO devices (name, ip, stream_url, status, last_online) VALUES (#{name}, #{ip}, #{streamUrl}, #{status}, #{lastOnline})
mapper.update: UPDATE devices SET status = 'offline' WHERE status = 'online' AND (last_online IS NULL OR last_online < #{deadline})
UPDATE devices SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id}
